/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -march=native -mtune=native -Wall -Wextra -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -fPIC -Wall -Wextra -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_display_only_overlay.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_display_only_overlay.dir/test_display_only_overlay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_only_overlay.dir/fbdev_display.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_only_overlay.dir/util_logging.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_only_overlay.dir/config_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_only_overlay.dir/queue_monitor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_display_only_overlay.dir/global_definitions.cpp.o -o test_display_only_overlay   -L/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/tflite/lib  -L/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/abseil/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/tflite/lib:/home/pi/Aurore/artifacts/abseil/lib -lpthread -ldl
